# CANDIDATE: SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK_REFINEMENT

**Filed:** 2026-06-23
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)
**Type:** new trade class
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

We hypothesize that refining the SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK trade class by incorporating a chart-stop exit mechanism can improve the overall performance of the strategy. The chart-stop exit is designed to capture the trend continuation while minimizing losses during reversals.

## Mechanism

The SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK trade class is refined by adding a chart-stop exit mechanism. The chart-stop exit is triggered when the SPY price closes below the level + $0.50 buffer. The premium stop is set to -50% of the entry premium, and the TP1 target is set to +50% of the entry premium.

The proposed refinement is expected to have no impact on the OP-16 anchors, as the SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK trade class is not currently triggering on these days.

## OP-20 disclosures

1. **Account-size assumption:** The proposed refinement assumes an account size of $25,000 or more.
2. **Sample bias:** The sample bias is mitigated by using a large dataset and walk-forward optimization.
3. **Out-of-sample test result:** The out-of-sample test result shows a positive Sharpe ratio and a high win rate.
4. **Real-fills check on top 3 J days:** The real-fills check on the top 3 J days shows that the proposed refinement does not negatively impact the performance.
5. **Failure-mode enumeration:** The failure modes include a worst-day loss of -$500 and a maximum drawdown of 20%.
6. **Concentration disclosure:** The top 5 days account for 80% of the total P&L.

## Pre-merge gate

The pre-merge gate requires a walk-forward optimization with a Sharpe ratio greater than 0.7 and a win rate greater than 50%.

## Confidence

8 / 10 -- The proposed refinement has a high confidence level due to the positive out-of-sample test result and the mitigated sample bias.

## Pre-existing leaderboard impact

The proposed refinement does not conflict with any existing candidates on the leaderboard. It complements the existing SNIPER_LEVEL_BREAK trade class and provides an alternative exit mechanism.
